hero.subtitle: FULL STACK ENGINEER
hero.description: Passionate Full Stack Developer, always seeking new technical challenges.

about.title: About
about.text: Full Stack Developer currently working at a startup, fully remote. Coming from a career change — bricklayer, truck driver, then developer — I've built a strong work ethic and adaptability that allows me to quickly ramp up on new technologies.

edh.title: EDH Analyser
edh.description: Web application for analyzing Magic: The Gathering EDH/Commander format. Deck analysis, AI recommendations, collection management.

hiji.title: Hiji — HR Platform
hiji.description: Full Stack Developer — design, development and maintenance of an international HR webapp. Front-end, back-end, databases, API integration, deployment, code reviews, AI tools.
